title: Fermented Crunchy Raw Friendly Cashew Crumble
description: This raw-friendly Brazilian dish features a fermented crunchy cashew crumble, infused with dark rum for an indulgent yet raw-friendly twist.
instructions: Soak the cashews in water for at least 8 hours or overnight.
Drain and rinse the soaked cashews, then blend them with dark rum until smooth.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth to remove any lumps, then add apple cider vinegar, cacao powder, coconut sugar, and sea salt. Mix well.
If desired, stir in alaea clay for an additional mineral boost.
Transfer the mixture into a large bowl or container that can be sealed tightly. Let it sit at room temperature, covered, for about 48 hours to ferment.
